I Heart Huckabees (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $12,784,713Details
International Box Office $7,250,000
Worldwide Box Office $20,034,713
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$292,177 (2.3% of total gross)
Legs:4.40 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:63.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$22,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:4 opening theaters/901 max. theaters, 3.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $23,292,596

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 1st, 2004 (Limited) by Fox Searchlight
International Releases: December 17th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
MPA Rating: R for language and a sex scene
Running Time: 105 minutes
Plot point: Environment, Political Activist, Satire
Social setting: Surrealism / Absurdism
Subgenre: Satirical Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: N1 European Film Produktions GmbH & Company
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
